---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Spectral Clip Forge
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🎨 Design Mockups

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or visual references.

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

Any technical details, dependencies, or implementation ideas:
- APIs or libraries involved
- Performance impact
- Security implications
- Platform compatibility

## 📊 User Impact

Who benefits from this feature?
- [ ] Content creators
- [ ] Developers/contributors
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] All users

## 🚀 Priority & Scope

**Priority:**
- [ ] Must-have (critical for product)
- [ ] Should-have (important but not critical)
- [ ] Nice-to-have (enhancement)
- [ ] Future consideration

**Scope:**
- [ ] Small (few hours of work)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days of work)
- [ ] Large (1+ weeks of work)

## 🌊 Spectral Flow Integration

How does this feature align with the Spectral Flow mythos?
- Branding opportunities
- Mythic naming suggestions
- User experience enhancements

## 📋 Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link to any related issues or discussions.

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples:
- Links to similar features in other products
- User feedback or requests
- Market research

---

**Spectral Note**: Every feature is a new artifact to forge in the Eternis-33 universe. Your ideas help shape the legendary experience. Thank you for contributing! 🔮
